en: I would have said Waffle House, but whatever.
Watching Alice Cooper, and all I can think of is that
he looks like a ball sack with face paint on.
Yeah, that's fair.
The Lumineers are the musical equivalent
to a triple venti half-sweet iced caramel macchiato.
ko: 트리플 벤티 반 스위트 아이스 카라멜 마키아토야.

en: F*** them and this.
Common is the pottery barn of rappers.
What the f*** do you know about rappers?
Like, honestly, saying Blink-182 is your favorite band
ko: 솔직히 블링크-182가 네가 좋아하는 밴드라고 말하는 건

en: is like saying I'm okay living with herpes.
ko: 헤르페스와 함께 사는 게 괜찮다고 말하는 것과 같아.

en: Use anti-frizz shampoo on my pubes
and now my penis looks like Steve Aoki.
ko: 이제 내 성기가 스티브 아오키 같아.

en: Waterfalls by TLC
has to be the worst song about waterfalls ever.
You know what? That's just some, like, natural earth bitch.
ko: 그거 알아? 그냥 자연의 여신 같은 거야.

en: You know what I'm saying? That said that.
ko: 내가 무슨 말 하는지 알지? 그렇게 말했어.

en: Fall Out Boy is the Comic Sans MS of music.
ko: 폴아웃 보이는 음악계의 코믹 산스 MS야.

en: They're both entirely overused.
Zendaya's skinny AF. Damn.
